productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Nike Black plain Black Backpacks
description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this black nike backpack. Carry it to college, office or on a casual day out with your friends. It will also prove to be handy for your workout sessions and other Sports endeavors, since it has a ventilated shoe compartment and lots of space to accomodate all your items. The perfect sturdy, good looking bag has arrived! Measurement Height: 47 cm Width: 36 cm Depth: 24 cm Capacity: 27 litres Made of coated water-resistant polyester for enhanced durability and style Nylon lining for increased durability Water-resistant tarapaulin bottom One main roomy zippered compartment with a zippered compartment on the front, complete with an organizer Separated wet/dry storage compartments on the front Zippered ventilated shoe compartment at the base Small zippered pouch on the side for stowing essentials nike Swoosh printed on the front Haul loops for ease of carrying Padded, adjustable shoulders straps with mesh lining, to absorb shock and cushion the shoulder, distributing loads more evenly Mesh panels on the back for improved comfort and ventilation Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
